words.meaning_en: A personal diary or a magazine published regularly
words.example_sentence: She wrote her feelings in her journal every night.

words.meaning_en: A book with blank pages used for writing notes
words.example_sentence: He wrote today's lesson in his notebook.

words.meaning_en: A plan showing times for activities or events
words.example_sentence: The teacher wrote the exam schedule on the board.

words.meaning_en: An instrument used to see objects far away, especially stars
words.example_sentence: He saw the moon clearly through the telescope.

words.meaning_en: A person who teaches students
words.example_sentence: Our teacher explained the lesson clearly.

words.meaning_en: A dark board used by teachers to write with chalk
words.example_sentence: The teacher wrote the sum on the blackboard.

words.meaning_en: A thin stick used for writing or drawing
words.example_sentence: She drew a picture with her pencil.

words.meaning_en: A small object used to remove pencil marks
words.example_sentence: He used the eraser to correct his mistake.

words.meaning_en: A place where books are kept and can be borrowed
words.example_sentence: She borrowed a storybook from the library.

words.meaning_en: School work that a student does at home
words.example_sentence: He finished his homework before dinner.

words.meaning_en: A formal test of knowledge or ability
words.example_sentence: She studied hard for the examination.

words.meaning_en: The head teacher in charge of a school
words.example_sentence: The principal gave a speech on Independence Day.

words.meaning_en: Not present at a place when expected
words.example_sentence: Three students were absent from class today.

words.meaning_en: A reward given for winning or excelling
words.example_sentence: She won first prize in the drawing competition.

words.meaning_en: A drawing showing countries, roads, or places
words.example_sentence: He drew a map of India in his project.

words.meaning_en: A book of maps
words.example_sentence: She used the atlas to find the capital of France.

words.meaning_en: A place inside a school or office where food is sold
words.example_sentence: We had samosas from the school canteen.

words.meaning_en: A white stick used for writing on a blackboard
words.example_sentence: The teacher wrote with a piece of chalk.

words.meaning_en: A list of topics to be covered in a school subject
words.example_sentence: The teacher gave us the syllabus for the year.

words.meaning_en: A task given to students to complete at home or in class
words.example_sentence: She finished her science assignment on time.

words.meaning_en: A drawing that explains or shows how something works
words.example_sentence: He drew a diagram of the water cycle.

words.meaning_en: A section of a book or textbook
words.example_sentence: We studied the second chapter of our history book.

words.meaning_en: A formal discussion where two sides argue different views
words.example_sentence: Our class held a debate on saving water.

words.meaning_en: A planned piece of work with a set goal, done in school
words.example_sentence: She made a project on the solar system.

words.meaning_en: The act of being present at school or an event
words.example_sentence: The teacher marked the attendance every morning.

words.meaning_en: Money given to a student to help pay for education
words.example_sentence: She won a scholarship for scoring top marks.

words.meaning_en: A room in a school where students have lessons
words.example_sentence: The students sat quietly in the classroom.

words.meaning_en: A period of learning or teaching
words.example_sentence: The math lesson lasted one hour.
